name: Fudge Nut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
"Give me anything but make it chocolate" is the rallying cry in many households. Chocolate it is with these unforgettable fudge nut bars. If you can keep hungry fingers off long enough, they freeze beautifully!
1. In a saucepan, combine chocolate pieces, cream cheese, and evaporated milk; stir over low heat until smooth.
2. Stir in nuts.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. In a large bowl, cream sugar and margarine until light and fluffy. Blend in eggs and vanilla. Add flour, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
5. Press half of the flour mixture onto the bottom of a 12 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan to form a crust.
6. Spread chocolate mixture over the crust.
7. Sprinkle with remaining crust mixture; press down gently.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the crust is lightly browned.
9. Cool and cut into bars. To freeze: prepare as directed. Wrap securely; freeze. When ready to serve, thaw unwrapped at room temperature, approximately 2 hours.
Yield: 24
